title: Changing the date on timeline column
excerpt:
Hi Monday Community, 
When entering a start and end date in the timeline, it is necessary to click through month by month to find the correct date. This is slightly annoying when between the two dates there are 3 or 5 ye…

posts.author: sarado (Sara Doguelli)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday Community,
When entering a start and end date in the timeline, it is necessary to click through month by month to find the correct date. This is slightly annoying when between the two dates there are 3 or 5 years time. Would it be possible to enter the date, the same as the “date” column?
That would make life much simpler.
Thank you!

posts.author: dnmonday (Desmond)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Sara,

It’s still clicking and not as simple as entering your desired date in the timeline column, but in your example about x years of time, you can click the dropdown arrow and select the year(s) to jump to. Save you some time/clicks rather than scrolling by month

posts.author: sarado (Sara Doguelli)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Desmond,
Apologies, I missed that option. Thank you so much for the quick response! Yes, that definitely saves a few clicks.
